- Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones (2002) (Action|Adventure|Sci-Fi|IMAX): Rated 5.0/5
- Twister (1996) (Action|Adventure|Romance|Thriller): Rated 4.0/5
- Blair Witch Project, The (1999) (Drama|Horror|Thriller): Rated 3.0/5
- Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope (1977) (Action|Adventure|Sci-Fi): Rated 5.0/5
- Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers, The (2002) (Adventure|Fantasy): Rated 5.0/5

Consider these two movies they have not seen:

- Movie A: Men in Black (a.k.a. MIB) (1997) (Action|Comedy|Sci-Fi), average rating 3.57/5 (1473 ratings)
- Movie B: Jaws: The Revenge (1987) (Horror|Thriller), average rating 1.88/5 (41 ratings)

A decision tree trained on this dataset finds that when the two movies' average ratings differ by 1.60 to 2.00, users prefer the higher-rated movie 91% of the time.

TASK: Predict which movie Person 1 would rate higher. Explain your reasoning in 1 sentence. Then conclude with exactly 'PREDICTION: 1' (Movie A) or 'PREDICTION: 0' (Movie B).

Consider these two movies they have not seen:

A decision tree trained on this dataset finds that when the two movies' average ratings differ by 1.60 to 2.00, users prefer the higher-rated movie 91% of the time.
